title: Array Operations
description:
Arrays in Java have a fixed size and store elements of the same type.

Fix the array declaration and access to print all numbers and their sum.
hints: Array indices start at 0. Use numbers.length to get the size.

checks.failMessage: Use .length to get array size, not .size.
Use < instead of <= to avoid ArrayIndexOutOfBounds.
Access array elements with brackets: numbers[i].
